'''fokashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:gymnospermic|gymnospermic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gymnospermic|gymnospermic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fokashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fokashithi|fokashithi]] || [[word:fokashiji|fokashiji]] || [[word:fokashishi|fokashishi]] || [[word:fokashiki|fokashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fokashuthuthu|fokashuthuthu]] || [[word:fokashujuju|fokashujuju]] || [[word:fokashushushu|fokashushushu]] || [[word:fokashukuku|fokashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fokashuthu|fokashuthu]] || [[word:fokashuju|fokashuju]] || [[word:fokashushu|fokashushu]] || [[word:fokashuku|fokashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fokashufthuf|fokashufthuf]] || [[word:fokashufjuf|fokashufjuf]] || [[word:fokashufshuf|fokashufshuf]] || [[word:fokashufkuf|fokashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fokashethe|fokashethe]] || [[word:fokasheje|fokasheje]] || [[word:fokasheshe|fokasheshe]] || [[word:fokasheke|fokasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fokashothotho|fokashothotho]] || [[word:fokashojojo|fokashojojo]] || [[word:fokashoshosho|fokashoshosho]] || [[word:fokashokoko|fokashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fokashotho|fokashotho]] || [[word:fokashojo|fokashojo]] || [[word:fokashosho|fokashosho]] || [[word:fokashoko|fokashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fokashofthof|fokashofthof]] || [[word:fokashofjof|fokashofjof]] || [[word:fokashofshof|fokashofshof]] || [[word:fokashofkof|fokashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fokashïfthïf|fokashïfthïf]] || [[word:fokashïfjïf|fokashïfjïf]] || [[word:fokashïfshïf|fokashïfshïf]] || [[word:fokashïfkïf|fokashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fokashïfthïfthïf|fokashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:fokashïfjïfjïf|fokashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:fokashïfshïfshïf|fokashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:fokashïfkïfkïf|fokashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fokashïfthïf|fokashïfthïf]] || [[word:fokashïfjïf|fokashïfjïf]] || [[word:fokashïfshïf|fokashïfshïf]] || [[word:fokashïfkïf|fokashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fokashïfthïf|fokashïfthïf]] || [[word:fokashïfjïf|fokashïfjïf]] || [[word:fokashïfshïf|fokashïfshïf]] || [[word:fokashïfkïf|fokashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fokashæthæ|fokashæthæ]] || [[word:fokashæjæ|fokashæjæ]] || [[word:fokashæshæ|fokashæshæ]] || [[word:fokashækæ|fokashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fokashathatha|fokashathatha]] || [[word:fokashajaja|fokashajaja]] || [[word:fokashashasha|fokashashasha]] || [[word:fokashakaka|fokashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fokashatha|fokashatha]] || [[word:fokashaja|fokashaja]] || [[word:fokashasha|fokashasha]] || [[word:fokashaka|fokashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fokashafthaf|fokashafthaf]] || [[word:fokashafjaf|fokashafjaf]] || [[word:fokashafshaf|fokashafshaf]] || [[word:fokashafkaf|fokashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fokashasha|fokashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fokashësha|fokashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fokashrosha|fokashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fokashmusha|fokashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fokashyasha|fokashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofokashnkshësha|gofokashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofokashnkrosha|gofokashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofokashnkmusha|gofokashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofokashnkyasha|gofokashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fokakashasha|fokakashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fokakashësha|fokakashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fokakashrosha|fokakashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fokakashmusha|fokakashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fokakashyasha|fokakashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofokakashnkshësha|gofokakashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofokakashnkrosha|gofokakashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofokakashnkmusha|gofokakashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofokakashnkyasha|gofokakashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fekæshasha|fekæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fekæshësha|fekæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fekæshrosha|fekæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fekæshmusha|fekæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fekæshyasha|fekæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofekæshnkshësha|gofekæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofekæshnkrosha|gofekæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofekæshnkmusha|gofekæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofekæshnkyasha|gofekæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fokfashasha|fokfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fokfashësha|fokfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fokfashrosha|fokfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fokfashmusha|fokfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fokfashyasha|fokfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofokfashnkshësha|gofokfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofokfashnkrosha|gofokfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofokfashnkmusha|gofokfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofokfashnkyasha|gofokfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
